warmup: Incline treadmill walk — 8-10 min, 3.3-3.5 mph, 6-8% incline

exercises.name: Leg Press
exercises.coaching_note: Clean 3×10 at 355 last Friday with no issues. Controlled tempo, don't lock knees at top.

exercises.name: Hip Thrust Machine
exercises.coaching_note: Hit 160 cleanly last Friday (bumped from 155 due to plate constraints). Full hip extension, squeeze at top, no hyperextension.

exercises.name: DB Romanian Deadlift
exercises.coaching_note: Hit 45 × 12 × 3 last week, session felt strong overall. Hinge from hips, soft knee bend, back stays flat.

exercises.name: Leg Curl
exercises.coaching_note: 88 was too much last Friday — got 10/9 then had to drop. Back to 77 and push for 12 each set. Build volume here before trying 88 again.

exercises.name: KB Swing (Two-Hand)
exercises.coaching_note: 30 felt light back in early May — time to try 35. Drive with hips, not arms. Good variety from the lunges and goblet squats you've been doing.

exercises.name: Core Circuit C
exercises.planned: Cable Crunch 50 lb × 12 + Hanging Knee Raise × 10-12 + Side Plank 25s/side · 2 rounds
exercises.coaching_note: Haven't hit this combo in a while. Kneeling cable crunch — round into it fully. Hanging knee raise — full hang, pull knees to chest.

finisher: Incline treadmill walk — 10 min (skip if session hits 65 min)
session_notes: Legs should be fresh — you hit upper today on a post-rough-weekend recovery day. Push the leg press and hip thrust. Dial back leg curl vs last Friday (88 was too much). KB swings for variety.
